reviews.comment:
Buena atencion pero no tienen MercadoPago para poder abinar co  e, telefono, y obtener descuentos por orokociones. Tampoco es bjeno el servicio mecánico, fui personalmente con jn problema y no lo solucionaron ni siquiera me trataron bien. El cambio de aceite y filtro, lo hacen solo a coches, jk aceptan camionetas, sin embargo la gente del ACA seguros te atiende muy bien. La concesion de cafeteria es regular. Poca variedad de sandwichs, muy mejorable....

(Translated by Google)
Good service, but they don't have MercadoPago to link your email, phone, and get discounts on promotions. The mechanical service isn't good either; I went in person with a problem and they didn't fix it, nor did they treat me well. They only change the oil and filter on cars; they don't accept trucks. However, the people at ACA Insurance provide excellent service. The cafeteria concession is just okay. There's little variety of sandwiches; it could be much better.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3043323831765025756/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN3ejl6bEpREAE
